pokemon:popplio.name: Popplio
pokemon:popplio.summary: This Pokémon can control water bubbles. It practices diligently so it can learn to make big bubbles.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon can control water bubbles. It practices diligently so it can learn to make big bubbles.
If Popplio want to create big, powerful balloons, they must be persistent. It takes daily practice for these Pokémon to develop their skills.
This Pokémon snorts body fluids from its nose, blowing balloons to smash into its foes. It’s famous for being a hard worker.
It creates special bouncy balloons to send at its opponents. When the balloons pop, the sheer force of their bursting is what deals damage.
Popplio gets on top of its bouncy water balloons to jump higher. It’s quite the acrobatic fighter!
The balloons it inflates with its nose grow larger and larger as it practices day by day.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon can control water bubbles. It practices diligently so it can learn to make big bubbles.

pokemon:brionne.name: Brionne
pokemon:brionne.summary: It cares deeply for its companions. When its Trainer is feeling down, it performs a cheery dance to try and help.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It cares deeply for its companions. When its Trainer is feeling down, it performs a cheery dance to try and help.
On nights when the sea is calm, Brionne dance with one another to the singing of the Primarina that’s leading them.
A skillful dancer, it creates a sequence of water balloons as it dances, and briskly bombards its enemies.
As if dancing, it artfully dodges the attacks of its enemies. All the while, it’s busy forming a bunch of balloons to overwhelm its foes.
It attacks by smacking its enemies with the exploding water balloons that it creates.
It gets excited when it sees a dance it doesn’t know. This hard worker practices diligently until it can learn that dance.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It cares deeply for its companions. When its Trainer is feeling down, it performs a cheery dance to try and help.

pokemon:primarina.name: Primarina
pokemon:primarina.summary: Its singing voice is its chief weapon in battle. This Pokémon’s Trainer must prioritize the daily maintenance of its throat at all costs.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Its singing voice is its chief weapon in battle. This Pokémon’s Trainer must prioritize the daily maintenance of its throat at all costs.
For Primarina, every battle’s a stage. Its singing and the dancing of its balloons will mesmerize the audience.
It controls its water balloons with song. The melody is learned from others of its kind and is passed down from one generation to the next.
With its mouth, it makes sonic waves that sound like beautiful singing. It uses the sonic waves to control its water balloons.
Also known as a songstress, it has a fantastical look on moonlit nights when it leads its colony in song.
To Primarina, every battle is a stage. It takes down its prey with beautiful singing and dancing.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Its singing voice is its chief weapon in battle. This Pokémon’s Trainer must prioritize the daily maintenance of its throat at all costs.
